function.name: savi_ensure_sources
function.eval: [[ 'Email', 'Reference', 'Telephonic', 'Field Manager Search', 'Website / Portal', 'Existing Customer', 'GEM / Tender', 'Walk-in / Other' ]]

function.name: savi_ensure_lost_reasons
function.eval: [[ 'Not Responding', 'Too Expensive', 'Not Enough Stock', 'No Budget', 'Competitor Selected', 'Requirement Deferred', 'Duplicate Lead', 'Not Relevant' ]]
